obj.title: Add result fields to action reviews
obj.current_problem: Actions and experiments can be created without a later result review.
obj.proposed_change: Add a weekly reminder to record result, metric movement, and next decision for each completed experiment.
obj.expected_benefit: Improves learning quality and prevents repeated unmeasured work.
obj.validation_test: Next weekly review includes result and decision fields for each completed experiment.

obj.title: Strengthen growth hook scoring
obj.current_problem: Growth ideas can be generated without an explicit demo strength score.
obj.proposed_change: Add a rule that each content idea must show the app, name the target user, and track view-to-download click rate.
obj.expected_benefit: Keeps distribution focused on product demos instead of generic founder content.
obj.validation_test: Generated growth reports include demo scene and metric for every idea.

obj.title: Add benchmark decision threshold
obj.current_problem: Model recommendations can compare metrics without a minimum improvement threshold.
obj.proposed_change: Require at least 15 percent latency improvement or 10 percent WER improvement before changing a default model.
obj.expected_benefit: Prevents churn from tiny benchmark differences.
obj.validation_test: Next model recommendation cites the threshold it passed.

action.title: Map first successful dictation blockers
action.problem: The activation path may contain unknown permission, model, or paste friction.
action.why_it_matters: First successful dictation is Vocalype's most important activation event.
action.action: Run a clean-install activation audit and record every step before first dictation.
action.validation_test: New profile reaches first successful dictation in under 3 minutes.

action.title: Rewrite activation failure copy
action.problem: License or login failures can leave users stuck.
action.why_it_matters: Activation confusion creates refund risk and support load.
action.action: Add cause, fix, and support path to every activation error.
action.validation_test: Trigger each activation failure and confirm the next step is obvious.
